description: Raise BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS floor from Math.max(600000, …) to Math.max(7200000, …) so the ceiling on a single bash invocation becomes 2 h instead of 10 min.

patches.description: Even when the user sets BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS, the compiled floor of 600000 ms (10 min) caps it. Many automation, fuzzing,
